name: automotive_navigation_msgs
description: Generic Messages for Navigation Objectives in Automotive Automation Software

CommandWithHandshake.raw:
# General Command Message
# Contains a command and a message counter that can be used for handshaking

std_msgs/Header header

uint8 msg_counter   # Increments each time a command is sent
                    # An acknowledge message should be published with this value

int16 command       # The command value

fields.name: msg_counter
fields.comment: Increments each time a command is sent

fields.name: command
fields.comment: The command value

DesiredDestination.raw:
# Desired Destination Message
# Contains the location of a desired destination

std_msgs/Header header

uint8 msg_counter   # Increments each time a command is sent
                    # An acknowledge message should be published with this value

uint16 valid        # 1 if location should be used, 0 to cancel out previous location

float64 latitude    # Latitude of destination (rad)
float64 longitude   # Longitude of destination (rad)

fields.name: msg_counter
fields.comment: Increments each time a command is sent

fields.name: valid
fields.comment: 1 if location should be used, 0 to cancel out previous location

fields.name: latitude
fields.comment: Latitude of destination (rad)

fields.name: longitude
fields.comment: Longitude of destination (rad)

Direction.raw:
# Simple vehicle direction
std_msgs/Header header

int8 BACKWARD=-1
int8 ZERO=0
int8 FORWARD=1

int8 direction

DistanceToDestination.raw:
# Distance To Destination Message
# Contains the distance to the desired destination

std_msgs/Header header

uint8 msg_counter   # Increments each time a command is sent
                    # An acknowledge message should be published with this value

float32 distance    # Distance to destination (m)

fields.name: msg_counter
fields.comment: Increments each time a command is sent

fields.name: distance
fields.comment: Distance to destination (m)

LaneBoundary.raw:
# Lane Boundary Message
# Contains an array of points and other details

uint8 UNKNOWN=0

uint8 SOLID=1
uint8 DASHED=2
uint8 SOLID_DASHED=3
uint8 DASHED_SOLID=4
uint8 SOLID_SOLID=5
uint8 style

uint8 WHITE=1
uint8 YELLOW=2
uint8 color

geometry_msgs/Point[] line

LaneBoundaryArray.raw:
# Lane Boundary Array Message
# Contains an array of lane boundaries contained in a section or segment of road

automotive_navigation_msgs/LaneBoundary[] boundaries

ModuleState.raw:
# Module State Message
# Contains the state of a module

std_msgs/Header header

string name     # Module's name of the source node of this message

string state    # Current state

string info     # Information on current state

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Module's name of the source node of this message

fields.name: state
fields.comment: Current state

fields.name: info
fields.comment: Information on current state

PointOfInterest.raw:
# Point of Interest Message
# Contains the guid, latitude, longitude, and other information for a point of interest

uint64 guid        # Unique Id for this point

float64 latitude   # Latitude (degrees)
float64 longitude  # Longitude (degrees)

string params      # List of parameter:value pairs

fields.name: guid
fields.comment: Unique Id for this point

fields.name: latitude
fields.comment: Latitude (degrees)

fields.name: longitude
fields.comment: Longitude (degrees)

fields.name: params
fields.comment: List of parameter:value pairs

PointOfInterestArray.raw:
# Point of Interest List Message
# Contains an array of points of interest
# update_num is incremented each time a new list is sent

std_msgs/Header header
uint16 update_num
automotive_navigation_msgs/PointOfInterest[] point_list

PointOfInterestRequest.raw:
# Point of Interest Request Message
# Contains information needed to request point of interest information

std_msgs/Header header

string name        # Name of the point of interest list

string module_name # module name of the requesting node

uint16 request_id  # Unique id of this request
                   # Can make another request with the same requestId and
                   # different update_num, guid, or tolerance.  New one will
                   # replace the old one.

uint16 cancel      # Set to 1 to cancel the request with this requestId

uint16 update_num  # The update number of the point list to use

uint16 guid_valid  # Request is for a specific point, not all points in list
uint64 guid        # The unique Id for the desired point

float32 tolerance  # How close to the current vehicle's position a point needs to be

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Name of the point of interest list

fields.name: module_name
fields.comment: module name of the requesting node

fields.name: request_id
fields.comment: Unique id of this request

fields.name: cancel
fields.comment: Set to 1 to cancel the request with this requestId

fields.name: update_num
fields.comment: The update number of the point list to use

fields.name: guid_valid
fields.comment: Request is for a specific point, not all points in list

fields.name: guid
fields.comment: The unique Id for the desired point

fields.name: tolerance
fields.comment: How close to the current vehicle's position a point needs to be

PointOfInterestResponse.raw:
# Point of Interest Response Message
# Contains status information about the points within the threshold

std_msgs/Header header

string name             # Name of the point of interest list

string module_name      # module name of the requesting node

uint16 request_id       # Unique id of this request

uint16 update_num       # The update number of the point list to use

automotive_navigation_msgs/PointOfInterestStatus[] point_statuses # The status information

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Name of the point of interest list

fields.name: module_name
fields.comment: module name of the requesting node

fields.name: request_id
fields.comment: Unique id of this request

fields.name: update_num
fields.comment: The update number of the point list to use

fields.name: point_statuses
fields.comment: The status information

PointOfInterestStatus.raw:
# Point of Interest Status Message
# Contains the distance, heading, a localized position of a point of interest

uint64 guid        # Unique Id for this point

float32 distance   # Great circle distance (meters)
float32 heading    # Heading (radians)
float32 x_position # Distance in front of the vehicle (meters)
float32 y_position # Distance to the left of the vehicle (meters)

string params      # List of parameter:value pairs

fields.name: guid
fields.comment: Unique Id for this point

fields.name: distance
fields.comment: Great circle distance (meters)

fields.name: heading
fields.comment: Heading (radians)

fields.name: x_position
fields.comment: Distance in front of the vehicle (meters)

fields.name: y_position
fields.comment: Distance to the left of the vehicle (meters)

fields.name: params
fields.comment: List of parameter:value pairs

RoadNetworkBoundaries.raw:
# Road Network Boundaries Array Message
# Contains an array of lane boundary arrays forming a map/road network

std_msgs/Header header

automotive_navigation_msgs/LaneBoundaryArray[] road_network_boundaries

GetImageForMapTile.raw:
string tile_id  # Id of the desired tile
---
bool success    # indicate successful run of triggered service
string message  # informational, e. g. for error messages

response_fields.name: success
response_fields.comment: indicate successful run of triggered service

response_fields.name: message
response_fields.comment: informational, e. g. for error messages
